title: Zuvo Coffee Cups 12 OZ - NO Lids - 100 Disposable Brown Ripple Coffee Cups - Ideal for Takeaways
features: Generous Capacity: With a 12 oz size, these cups provide ample space for your favorite hot beverages, from lattes to cappuccinos.
Convenient Bulk Pack: Each pack includes 100 disposable cups, providing a cost-effective solution for businesses and events of any size.
Premium Quality: Crafted with durable materials, Zuvo Takeaway Coffee Cups ensure your beverages stay warm and delicious while on the go.
Eco-Friendly Design: Made with 100% recyclable materials, these black ripple coffee cups offer a sustainable solution for your takeaway needs.
Sleek and Professional: The sleek black design and ripple texture add a touch of elegance, making them perfect for cafes, offices, and events.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page What materials are typically used in the construction of disposable paper coffee cups? Disposable paper coffee cups are commonly made from a combination of paper and a thin plastic lining. The paper provides structure, while the plastic lining prevents leaks and helps insulate the cup. How are disposable paper coffee cups designed to withstand hot beverages without leaking or deforming? We use a combination of sturdy paperboard and a heat-resistant plastic lining to withstand hot beverages without leaking or deforming. Are disposable coffee cups easy to hold? How's the grip? With a ripple design, they offer an ergonomic grip, making them easy to hold securely.
